channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Broken and holey fencing, 25th April
item.description:
Fencing is broken, with big holes that people and animals have been climbing through, and chicken wire sticking out onto the pavement which I have seen catch both small children from the nearby primary school, and dogs, as they walk past. The whole front stretch is falling apart

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Parkview Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Fairthorn Road, 25th April
item.description:
Site pollution. Rubbish left on street (bottom of Fairthorn Road) for nearly a week. Causing smell and attracting rats.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fairthorn Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Railing sticking out dangerously, 25th April
item.description:
The railing about half way along the footpath between romney drive and scotts park school has broken and there's a particularly spiky bit in a dangerous position. My child's buggy keeps catching on it and it has damaged the buggy, and it is the perfect height to scratch a young child/wheelchair users head if they dont know it is there. Also if someone brushes past it then it would badly scratch them

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orchard Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle with no tax or MOT, 25th April
item.description:
Black BMW illegally parked for the last five months on footway btwn Courthill Road and Holly Hedge Terrace nr 117A Courthill Rd. Public records show no MOT or up to date tax. Car is visibly damaged. Car is not parked in a designated space as the bollard is still up. It is blocking ingress/egress to properties behind and is also a fire safety hazard. Has been reported to Lewisham Parking twice already.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holly Hedge Terrace, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Gas Canisters, 25th April
item.description:
Two boxes and approx 10 canisters dumped in Barnehurst Avenue next to road sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnehurst Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 25th April
item.description:
Burst open bag of building waste and a cot frame dumped just under railway bridge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Manor Way, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Permit holders parking sign leaning at ~45°, base appears loose, posing trip/safety risk on pavement, 25th April
item.description:
Near ///jacket.jazzy.study Explain what’s wrong: The “Permit holders parking only past this point” sign post is leaning at a significant angle and appears unstable at its base. It looks like it could fall fully onto the pavement. The pavement here is well used by pedestrians, including children walking to and from Surrey Square Primary, so it’s a safety concern. Noticed it earlier today.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sedan Way, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 57a/ Gas cupboard, 25th April
item.description:
Litter, boxes, chairs blocking the path to 57a and obscuring a gas cupboard. washing machine by the bins Yellow construction bag left outside.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag (Estates)

item.title: Fallen fence, 25th April
item.description:
Motorbikes and electric bikes can get access to park Was personally observed Endangering public paths with reckless driving

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elstree Gardens, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement surface has big hole., 25th April
item.description:
Dangerous damaged pavement on Holloway Road, opposite Piazza da Milano. Broken and sunken paving slabs have created a hole and uneven surface causing a serious trip hazard. This is a very busy pedestrian area and poses a risk to elderly people, children, wheelchair users and the public. Please inspect urgently and repair as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingsdown Road, Tufnell Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown hedge beside communal grass area and footpath, 25th April
item.description:
This hedge is maintained by bromley , as its is right beside communal grass, its right outside 139 elmstead lane, and the hedge is too tall and blocking view of cars , and also all the front needs to be cut, its growing over footpath. and disabled tenanant cannot cut this, its too hard to cut, and needs to have the height of hedge cut back, too overgrown
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Lane, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree undergrowth causes obstruction for pedestrians and parking, 25th April
item.description:
There is a lot of undergrowth on trees in Chaffinch rd, this one and the one next to it are particularly bad for access for buggies, wheelchairs, scootmobiles and parking, which makes it also difficult to drive if cars are parked both sides of the road. I reported this in May last year and it was on the ‘schedule’ this winter but obviously got missed. There’s another tree that needs doing opposite 39 Chaffinch rd and a few in that are in Thayers farm rd too, might as well sort them all whilst you’re here! Thank you 🙏

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chaffinch Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping chucked into garden, 25th April
item.description:
The resident has has people fly tipping over their fence and the landlord refuses to help

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, St Mary's Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree routes lifting pavement and on property, 25th April
item.description:
Tree by side of road is lifting pavements and also lifting paving on private property at #26. It’s got noticeably worse in the last 3 months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Somerville Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Albert street near M&S, 25th April
item.description:
Mountains of rubbish cascading from open bins all over the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albert Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Grass verges / Shrub beds - Littering

item.title: Large hole burned in bench, 25th April
item.description:
Large hole burned in bench by exercise equipment.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith High Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 25th April
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Deck Close, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees have been cut down badly, 25th April
item.description:
Recently discovered that a row of mature trees in Queenscroft Park have been cut down badly leaving an eyesore.The trees were in fine form last summer. Debris has been left near the trees and on the nearby path and is still there today (25th April). Please could all the debris be removed as it is dangerous and uneven surface. Also new trees planted. This is very poor that this has happened.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham Hill, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pastageddon: dozens of boxes of expired dry pasta, 25th April
item.description:
Several hundreds of packets of expired pasta have been dumped in a few separate piles. They're being accessed by wildlife and dragged all over the area. There are bits of equipment between the pasta boxes indicating this could be a dump from a restaurant/bar.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bexley Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain blocked in Russell Gardens, on the right hand corner when approaching from Russell Road., 25th April
item.description:
Hi, there is a blocked drain on the right hand corner in Russell Gardens when approaching from Russell Road that always floods when it rains. It's been blocked for at least 6 months probably a lot longer and in one of the pictures you can see grass growing up through the grating. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Russell Gardens, Whetstone, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
